name: Greek Chicken and Spaghetti
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine the first seven ingredients. Cook just until bubbly.
2. Cool to room temperature. In a medium bowl, combine the cooled mixture and chicken that has been cut into strips; toss to coat. Marinate for 20 to 30 minutes at room temperature.
3. Prepare Creamette Spaghetti according to package directions; drain.
4. In a Dutch oven or large skillet, heat the remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil. Add the chicken mixture and red peppers. Stir-fry just until the chicken is slightly pink.
5. Add the yellow squash and zucchini. Cook until hot.
6. In a small bowl, blend the cold water, cornstarch, bouillon, and salt. Add to the chicken mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened and translucent.
7. Add the hot spaghetti; toss to mix. Heat through.
8. Arrange on a warm serving platter. Serve immediately. Refrigerate leftovers.
